_schema.description: Canonical mouse-button label contract between Rust (src-tauri/src/listener.rs::button_label) and TypeScript (frontend/src/utils/binding.ts). The 'label' strings are persisted verbatim in shortcut.json (Rust) and voice-hub.shortcut localStorage (TS). Do not rename labels without updating both sides.
_schema.authority: Rust listener.rs is authoritative; TS must mirror.
_schema.coverage_test: Rust: listener.rs::tests::mousemap_json_coverage asserts every static entry round-trips through button_label. TS: binding.test.ts asserts formatBinding produces the label string for each entry.
_schema.side_label_pattern: Side buttons are dynamic: rdev::Button::Unknown(n) => 'Side{n}'. Only the most common variants (Side6, Side7) are listed here as documentation. The pattern itself is the contract — both sides must accept any 'Side' followed by a decimal integer.
_schema.excluded: Button::Left is intentionally excluded; it would block normal mouse clicks.

buttons.label: Middle
buttons.notes: Middle mouse button / scroll wheel click

buttons.label: Side8
buttons.notes: Extended side button; present on some gaming mice
